summary: Current-state reconciliation continues away from surface-only W-route exposure. The source now exposes composition stability as product-facing QuillenExactCategory class API, instantiates those fields for canonical MetrizableLCA strict exact sequences, exposes exact maps of positive-degree Yoneda representatives, adds a direct YonedaExt.ofPositiveChain bridge whose relation, split-factor, and Baer-sum laws descend to Ext classes, and connects those Ext classes to public Yoneda product relation, split-factor, and additivity laws. This is real exact-category/Yoneda API progress, but not product completion because the full Yoneda Ext and bounded derived infinity-category obligations remain open.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: no OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the original four-task contract exists.
The exact-category core now exposes class-level composition-stability fields and the canonical MetrizableLCA instance fills them, but the complete original four-task witness is still absent.

Yoneda one-fold extensions and positive-degree chains now expose their ambient exact-category head inflation/deflation maps and descend relation/split-factor/Baer-sum laws through YonedaExt.ofPositiveChain and into public Yoneda product relation, split-factor, and additivity laws, but the full Yoneda Ext group obligation is not yet audited as a final positive witness.
Bounded derived infinity-category integration remains incomplete as an original-contract obligation.
remaining_work: Continue from the strengthened exact-category core and ofPositiveChain product relation/split/additivity bridge into higher Yoneda Ext group integration.
Continue the bounded derived infinity-category positive witness integration only after the exact-category and Yoneda obligations are represented by honest Lean declarations.
